title: Follow Target Leader
description: Allows mob to move towards its current target leader.

always_look_for_leader.title: Always Look For Leader
always_look_for_leader.description: If true, the mob will always search for a valid leader to follow if none is found or current leader is not valid anymore

follow_distance.description: Defines the distance in blocks the mob will stay from its target while following.
follow_distance.title: Follow Distance

leader_filters.title: Leader Filters
leader_filters.description: The filters to use when determining if a mob is a suitable leader or not.

search_cooldown.title: Search Cooldown
search_cooldown.description: Number of ticks that must pass before a new search is initiated after a target is not found, lost, or becomes invalid.

within_radius.description: Defines the maximum distance in blocks a mob can get from its target captain before giving up trying to follow it.
within_radius.title: Within Radius
